message:
fix(pipeline,robot): fix race condition and agent type filtering bugs

Pipeline:
- Add varMu sync.RWMutex to protect state.Variables during parallel step execution
- Wrap substituteVariables() and evaluateCondition() with read locks
- Wrap Variables writes in executeParallelStep() with write lock
- Prevents data races when multiple goroutines access Variables concurrently

Robot:
- Fix agent type filtering to normalize both sides of comparison
- agentType from pane title uses short form (cc/cod/gmi)
- User input could use either form (claude/codex or cc/cod)
- Previously --type=claude would never match cc agents

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
